questions.question: Do I need coding skills to use facadely?
questions.answer:
No! facadely is designed for everyone.

Our intuitive drag-and-drop interface makes it easy to create professional websites without any coding knowledge.

questions.question: Can I use my own domain name?
questions.answer:
Yes, you can connect your custom domain or purchase a new one directly through facadely.

We handle all the technical setup for you.

questions.question: Are the templates mobile-responsive?
questions.answer:
Absolutely! All our templates are fully responsive and optimized for mobile, tablet, and desktop devices.

Your site will look perfect on any screen size.

questions.question: Can I switch templates after launching my site?
questions.answer:
Yes, you can change your template at any time without losing your content.

Your text, images, and settings will transfer seamlessly.

questions.question: Is there a free trial?
questions.answer:
Yes! You can start building your website for free.

No credit card required. Upgrade when you're ready to publish.

questions.question: What kind of support do you offer?
questions.answer:
We provide 24/7 customer support via chat and email.

Our help center also includes tutorials, guides, and FAQs to help you succeed.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How quickly can I launch my website?
items.answer: You can launch a professional website in as little as 5 minutes. Simply choose a template, customize it with our drag & drop editor, and hit publish. No technical knowledge required.

items.question: Do I need coding skills?
items.answer: Absolutely not! facadely is designed for everyone. Our intuitive visual editor lets you create stunning websites without writing a single line of code.

items.question: Can I use my own domain name?
items.answer: Yes! You can connect your existing domain or purchase a new one directly through facadely. We handle all the technical setup automatically.

items.question: Are websites mobile-responsive?
items.answer: Every template is fully responsive and optimized for all devices. Your website will look perfect on desktop, tablet, and mobile automatically.

items.question: What kind of support do you offer?
items.answer: We provide 24/7 customer support via chat and email. Our extensive help center includes video tutorials, guides, and documentation to help you succeed.

items.question: Can I add e-commerce functionality?
items.answer: Yes! Our Pro and Business plans include full e-commerce capabilities with payment processing, inventory management, and order tracking.

questions.question: How do I sign up for facadely?
questions.answer: Signing up is simple! Click the "Sign up" button on our homepage, enter your email address, create a password, and verify your email. You'll have instant access to all our templates and the builder.

questions.question: Do I need a credit card to start?
questions.answer: No! You can create an account and start building for free without providing any credit card information. You only need to add payment details if you want to upgrade to a paid plan or publish your site.

questions.question: How long does it take to build a website?
questions.answer: You can have a professional website live in as little as 5 minutes! Our pre-designed templates are ready to customize, and you can publish immediately. The time depends on how much customization you want to do.

questions.question: Can I use my own domain name?
questions.answer: Yes! You can connect your existing domain or purchase a new one directly through facadely. We handle all the technical setup including DNS configuration and SSL certificates automatically.

questions.question: Are the templates mobile-responsive?
questions.answer: Absolutely! All our templates are fully responsive and optimized for mobile, tablet, and desktop. Your website will look perfect on any device, and we automatically handle responsive design for you.

questions.question: Can I add e-commerce functionality?
questions.answer: Yes! Our Pro and Business plans include full e-commerce capabilities with payment processing, inventory management, order tracking, and customer management tools built-in.

questions.question: Do I need coding skills to customize my site?
questions.answer: No! Our visual editor is designed for everyone. You can customize colors, fonts, layouts, and content by simply dragging and dropping elements. No coding knowledge required.

questions.question: Can I change templates after launching?
questions.answer: Yes! You can switch templates anytime without losing your content. Your text, images, and settings will transfer seamlessly to the new template.

questions.question: How can I add custom CSS or HTML?
questions.answer: Our Pro and Business plans include custom code functionality. You can add custom CSS, JavaScript, or HTML to specific sections of your website for advanced customization.

questions.question: What kind of support do you offer?
questions.answer: We provide 24/7 customer support via chat and email. Our extensive help center includes video tutorials, guides, and FAQs. Pro and Business plans get priority support.

questions.question: How long does it take to get a response from support?
questions.answer: Standard support typically responds within 24 hours. Priority support (available on Pro and Business plans) responds within 2 hours during business hours.

questions.question: How do I upgrade to a paid plan?
questions.answer: You can upgrade anytime from your account settings. Go to Billing > Plans, choose your desired plan, and complete the payment. Your upgrade takes effect immediately.

questions.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
questions.answer: Yes! You can cancel your subscription anytime from your account settings. If you cancel mid-cycle, you won't be charged again, but you can use the service until your current period ends.

questions.question: Is my website secure?
questions.answer: Yes! All facadely websites include SSL certificates, automatic backups, and 99.9% uptime SLA. We also provide DDoS protection and regular security audits.

questions.question: Where is my data stored?
questions.answer: Your data is stored on secure, redundant servers in multiple geographic locations. We use enterprise-grade encryption and comply with GDPR and other data protection regulations.

stillHaveQuestions.title: Still Have Questions?
stillHaveQuestions.subtitle: Our support team is here to help. Get in touch and we'll respond as quickly as we can.

introduction.heading: Introduction
introduction.content: At facadely, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our website building platform.

provided.heading: 1.1 Information You Provide
provided.intro: We collect information that you voluntarily provide when using our Service:

items.label: Account Information
items.description: Name, email address, and profile information

items.label: Payment Information
items.description: Billing details (processed securely through third-party providers)

items.label: Website Content
items.description: Text, images, videos, and other content you upload

items.label: Communications
items.description: Messages you send us through support channels

automatic.heading: 1.2 Information Automatically Collected
automatic.intro: When you use facadely, we automatically collect certain information:

items.label: Usage Data
items.description: Pages visited, features used, time spent on platform

items.label: Device Information
items.description: IP address, browser type, operating system

items.label: Cookies
items.description: Session cookies, preference cookies, analytics cookies

socialLogin.heading: 1.3 Social Login Information
socialLogin.content: If you sign up using social login (Google, Apple, Facebook), we receive basic profile information including your name, email address, and profile picture.

howWeUseYourInformation.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
howWeUseYourInformation.intro: We use the information we collect for the following purposes:
items: Provide, maintain, and improve the website building platform
Process your website creations and publish them online
Manage your account and subscriptions
Process payments and prevent fraud
Send service updates, security alerts, and technical notices
Respond to your support requests and inquiries
Analyze usage patterns to improve features and user experience
Comply with legal obligations and regulatory requirements

informationSharing.heading: 3. How We Share Your Information
informationSharing.intro: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information in the following circumstances:

items.label: Service Providers
items.description: Third-party vendors who perform services on our behalf (hosting, payment processing, email delivery, analytics)

items.label: Business Transfers
items.description: In connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets

items.label: Legal Requirements
items.description: When required by law, subpoena, or government request

items.label: With Your Consent
items.description: When you explicitly authorize us to share your information

dataSecurity.heading: 4. Data Security
dataSecurity.intro: We implement robust security measures to protect your information:
items: All data transmitted is encrypted using SSL/TLS protocols
Strict access controls ensure only authorized personnel can access sensitive data
Regular security assessments and penetration testing
Your data is regularly backed up to prevent loss
dataSecurity.disclaimer: While we use industry-standard security measures, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security, but we continuously work to improve our security practices.

cookies.heading: 5. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
cookies.intro: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience. You can control cookies through your browser settings or our cookie preference tool.
cookies.note: For detailed information about our use of cookies, please see our Cookie Policy.

yourRights.heading: 6. Your Privacy Rights
yourRights.intro: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights:

items.label: Access and Portability
items.description: Request a copy of your personal data

items.label: Correction
items.description: Update or correct inaccurate personal information

items.label: Deletion
items.description: Request deletion of your personal data

items.label: Objection
items.description: Object to or restrict certain processing activities

items.label: Withdraw Consent
items.description: Withdraw consent for marketing communications

yourRights.note: To exercise your rights, contact us at privacy@facadely.com. We will respond within 30 days.

dataRetention.heading: 7. Data Retention
dataRetention.intro: We retain your information for as long as necessary to provide our Service and comply with legal obligations:
items: Active accounts: Data retained while your account is active
Closed accounts: Account data deleted within 30 days of closure
Legal requirements: Some data may be retained longer to comply with legal obligations

internationalTransfers.heading: 8. International Data Transfers
internationalTransfers.content: facadely is based in South Korea. If you access our Service from outside South Korea, your information may be transferred to, stored, and processed in South Korea or other countries where our service providers operate.
internationalTransfers.safeguards: We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place for international transfers, including Standard Contractual Clauses approved by regulatory authorities.

childrenPrivacy.heading: 9. Children's Privacy
childrenPrivacy.content: facadely is not intended for users under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we become aware that we have collected data from a child without parental consent, we will take steps to delete that information promptly.

changes.heading: 10. Changes to This Privacy Policy
changes.intro: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you of material changes by:
items: Posting the updated policy on this page with a new "Last Updated" date
Sending an email notification to your registered email address
Displaying a prominent notice on our Service

gdpr.title: For EU/EEA Users (GDPR)
gdpr.intro: If you are located in the European Union or European Economic Area, you have additional rights under GDPR:
items: Right to lodge a complaint with your local supervisory authority
Right to object to automated decision-making and profiling
Legal basis for processing: Consent, contractual necessity, legitimate interests

ccpa.title: For California Users (CCPA)
ccpa.intro: California residents have specific rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act:
items: Right to know what personal information is collected and how it's used
Right to delete personal information (with certain exceptions)
Right to opt-out of the sale of personal information (we do not sell personal information)
Right to non-discrimination for exercising CCPA rights

contact.heading: 12. Contact Us
contact.intro: If you have questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:
contact.address: Address: facadely Corp., Seoul, South Korea

footer.message: Your privacy is important to us. We're committed to protecting your data and being transparent about our practices.

agreement.heading: 1. Agreement to Terms
agreement.intro: Welcome to facadely. By accessing or using our website builder platform ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you disagree with any part of these terms, you may not access the Service.
agreement.description: facadely provides a no-code website building platform that allows users to create, customize, and publish professional websites without technical knowledge. These Terms apply to all users of the Service, including without limitation users who are browsers, builders, and contributors of content.

accountTerms.heading: 2. Account Terms
items: You must be at least 18 years old to use this Service, or the age of majority in your jurisdiction.
You must provide accurate and complete information when creating your account.
You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and password.
You are responsible for all activities that occur under your account.
You may not use the Service for any illegal or unauthorized purpose.
One person or legal entity may not maintain more than one free account.

acceptable.heading: 3.1 Acceptable Use
acceptable.intro: You agree to use facadely only for lawful purposes. You are prohibited from:
items: Publishing content that is illegal, harmful, threatening, abusive, or discriminatory
Infringing on intellectual property rights of others
Distributing malware, viruses, or harmful code
Attempting to gain unauthorized access to the Service
Using the Service to send spam or unsolicited communications
Creating websites that promote illegal activities

limits.heading: 3.2 Service Limits
limits.content: Your use of the Service is subject to the limitations of your chosen plan (Free, Pro, or Business). These limitations include but are not limited to: number of websites, storage capacity, bandwidth, and feature access. Exceeding these limits may result in service interruption or additional charges.

items.label: Subscription Plans
items.content: Paid plans (Pro and Business) are billed on a monthly or annual basis as selected by you.

items.label: Auto-Renewal
items.content: Subscriptions automatically renew unless cancelled before the renewal date.

items.label: Cancellation
items.content: You may cancel your subscription at any time. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.

items.label: Refunds
items.content: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for first-time annual subscriptions. Monthly subscriptions are non-refundable.

items.label: Price Changes
items.content: We reserve the right to modify pricing with 30 days notice to existing subscribers.

items.label: Taxes
items.content: Prices do not include applicable taxes, which will be added as required by local law.

yourContent.heading: 5.1 Your Content
yourContent.content: You retain all rights to the content you create and publish using facadely. By using our Service, you grant us a limited license to host, store, and display your content as necessary to provide the Service.

facadelyCon.heading: 5.2 facadely Content
facadelyCon.content: All templates, designs, features, and functionality provided by facadely remain our intellectual property. You receive a license to use these elements only as part of creating websites through our Service.

dataPrivacy.heading: 6. Data and Privacy
dataPrivacy.intro: Your use of the Service is also governed by our Privacy Policy. We collect and use your data as described in our Privacy Policy. By using facadely, you consent to such collection and use.
dataPrivacy.security: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

serviceAvailability.heading: 7. Service Availability and Support
items: We strive for 99.9% uptime but do not guarantee uninterrupted service.
We may perform scheduled maintenance with advance notice when possible.
Support levels vary by plan: Community (Free), Priority (Pro), and Dedicated (Business).
We reserve the right to modify or discontinue features with reasonable notice.

limitation.heading: 8. Limitation of Liability
limitation.content: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, FACADELY SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, OR ANY LOSS OF PROFITS OR REVENUES, WHETHER INCURRED DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY, OR ANY LOSS OF DATA, USE, GOODWILL, OR OTHER INTANGIBLE LOSSES.
limitation.cap: In no event shall our total liability to you for all damages exceed the amount you paid to Facadely in the 12 months prior to the claim, or $100, whichever is greater.

termination.heading: 9. Termination
termination.intro: We may terminate or suspend your account and access to the Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason, including breach of these Terms. Upon termination:
items: Your right to use the Service will immediately cease
You will have 30 days to export your content
Your published websites will be taken offline
No refunds will be provided for remaining subscription time (except as required by law)

changesTerms.heading: 10. Changes to Terms
changesTerms.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will provide notice of material changes by email or through the Service at least 30 days before they take effect. Your continued use of the Service after changes constitute acceptance of the modified Terms.

governingLaw.heading: 11. Governing Law and Disputes
governingLaw.intro: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Korea, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
governingLaw.disputes: Any disputes arising from these Terms or the Service shall be resolved through binding arbitration in Seoul, South Korea, except where prohibited by law.

contactInformation.heading: 12. Contact Information
contactInformation.intro: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:
contactInformation.address: Address: Facadely Corp., Seoul, South Korea

severability.heading: 13. Severability and Waiver
severability.severabilityContent: If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable or invalid, that provision will be limited or eliminated to the minimum extent necessary so that the Terms will otherwise remain in full force and effect.
severability.waiver: Our failure to enforce any right or provision of these Terms will not be considered a waiver of those rights.

entireAgreement.heading: 14. Entire Agreement
entireAgreement.content: These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy and any other legal notices published by us on the Service, constitute the entire agreement between you and Facadely concerning the Service.

footer.message: By using Facadely, you acknowledge that you have read and understood these Terms of Service.

introduction.heading: Introduction
introduction.content: This Cookie Policy explains how facadely uses cookies and similar tracking technologies on our website and platform.

whatAreCookies.heading: 1. What Are Cookies?
whatAreCookies.content: Cookies are small files stored on your device that contain information about your visit. They help us recognize you, remember your preferences, and understand how you use our Service.

categories.name: Essential Cookies
categories.description: Required for the Service to function. These cannot be disabled without affecting site functionality.

categories.name: Functional Cookies
categories.description: Remember your preferences and settings to enhance your experience.

categories.name: Analytical Cookies
categories.description: Help us understand how you use the Service to improve features and performance.

categories.name: Marketing Cookies
categories.description: Track your activity to deliver personalized advertisements and marketing content.

cookieDetails.heading: 3. Cookie Details
cookieDetails.table: See detailed list of cookies used below

thirdPartyServices.heading: 4. Third-Party Services
thirdPartyServices.intro: We use third-party services that may set their own cookies:

yourChoices.heading: 5. Your Choices
yourChoices.intro: You have the following options regarding cookies:
options: Browser Settings: Most browsers allow you to refuse cookies or alert you when cookies are being sent.
Cookie Preference Tool: Use our cookie preference center to manage your cookie choices.
Opt-Out Links: Third-party services typically provide opt-out mechanisms.
yourChoices.note: Please note that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of our Service.

contact.heading: 6. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at privacy@facadely.com

hero.title:
Resources &
Blog
hero.subtitle: Learn how to build, grow, and optimize your website with expert tips, tutorials, and best practices.

posts.title: Getting Started: How to Build Your First Website in 5 Minutes
posts.excerpt: Learn the basics of creating a professional website without any coding experience. We'll walk you through every step.
posts.content:
Creating a website has never been easier. With facadely, you can have a professional-looking website up and running in just 5 minutes. In this guide, we'll show you exactly how to get started.

## Step 1: Choose a Template
Start by browsing our collection of beautiful, professionally designed templates. Each template is fully responsive and mobile-friendly.

## Step 2: Customize Your Content
Add your own text, images, and branding to make your website unique. Drag and drop elements to arrange them exactly how you want.

## Step 3: Publish Your Site
Once you're happy with your website, simply click publish. Your site will be live and accessible to your customers immediately.

That's it! You now have a professional website without spending thousands on developers.
posts.author: facadely Team

posts.title: 10 Website Design Tips That Will Boost Your Conversions
posts.excerpt: Discover proven design principles that help convert visitors into customers. These simple tips can increase your sales.
posts.content:
Design is not just about aesthetics—it's about creating an experience that converts. Here are 10 design tips that will help you boost your conversion rates.

## 1. White Space is Your Friend
Don't overcrowd your pages. Let elements breathe with plenty of white space.

## 2. Clear Call-to-Action Buttons
Make your CTA buttons stand out. Use contrasting colors and compelling text.

## 3. Fast Loading Times
Ensure your website loads quickly. Slow sites lead to high bounce rates.

## 4. Mobile-First Design
Design for mobile first, then scale up. Most users browse on mobile devices.

## 5. Consistent Branding
Use the same colors, fonts, and style throughout your site for a professional look.

Following these tips will help you create a website that not only looks great but also converts visitors into customers.
posts.author: Design Expert

posts.title: SEO Basics: How to Get Your Website Ranked on Google
posts.excerpt: Master the fundamentals of SEO and start getting organic traffic from search engines. A complete beginner's guide.
posts.content:
Search Engine Optimization (SEO) is crucial for getting your website noticed. Here's how to optimize your site for search engines.

## Keyword Research
Start by researching keywords related to your business. These are the terms your customers use to find you.

## On-Page Optimization
Optimize your page titles, meta descriptions, and content for your target keywords.

## Quality Content
Create valuable content that answers your customers' questions. Google rewards fresh, relevant content.

## Build Backlinks
Gain links from reputable websites to improve your domain authority.

## Technical SEO
Ensure your website is properly structured and easily crawlable by search engines.

With consistent effort on these SEO basics, you'll start seeing improvements in your search engine rankings.
posts.author: SEO Specialist

posts.title: Email Marketing Strategies That Actually Work
posts.excerpt: Learn effective email marketing tactics to grow your business and keep customers engaged.
posts.content:
Email marketing remains one of the most effective ways to reach your customers. Here are proven strategies that work.

## Build Your List
Start collecting email addresses from day one. Offer a valuable incentive to encourage signups.

## Segment Your Audience
Divide your email list into segments based on interests and behavior. Send targeted messages to each group.

## Craft Compelling Subject Lines
Your subject line is the first thing people see. Make it count with clear, compelling text.

## Focus on Value
Provide real value in every email. Tips, discounts, and valuable content keep people engaged.

## Test and Optimize
Always test different approaches and optimize based on results. Track open rates and click-through rates.
posts.author: Marketing Manager

posts.title: 5 Common Website Mistakes and How to Avoid Them
posts.excerpt: Discover the most common mistakes people make when building websites and how to prevent them.
posts.content:
Many new website owners make the same mistakes. Learn how to avoid them from the start.

## 1. Poor Navigation
Make it easy for visitors to find what they're looking for. Clear, intuitive navigation is essential.

## 2. Outdated Content
Keep your content fresh and updated. Outdated information damages credibility.

## 3. Slow Performance
Optimize images and minimize code to improve page speed. Users won't wait for slow websites.

## 4. Not Mobile Responsive
Your site must work perfectly on mobile devices. Mobile traffic is crucial.

## 5. Weak Security
Protect your website and your visitors. Use HTTPS and keep software updated.

Avoiding these mistakes will help you create a website that works well for both you and your visitors.
posts.author: facadely Team
